checks.note: VPS_INSTALL.md + HANDOFF.md describe serving index.html for /zone/* deep-links
dist/index.html present; no static file under /zone/* shadows the fallback
serve index.html for unmatched paths on torii.quest — manual maintainer step, outside this repo
none — the update-check is read-only and actionable:false; deploys stay a manual maintainer action

readiness.note: Static-host deployment readiness for the gateway /zone/* travel feature. The repo-side prerequisites (docs describe the index.html SPA fallback; a built dist/ has index.html with no /zone/* file shadowing it) are verified LOCALLY by npm run zones:check / regression-check [15]. Configuring the real host fallback and deploying stay MANUAL maintainer steps — this surface only INFORMS.
